title: Rich Savory Norwegian Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and comforting one-pot Norwegian dish featuring Italian seasoning, perfect for a cold evening. This ovo-vegetarian friendly stew is slow-cooked to perfection in a donabe.
instructions: Heat the donabe over medium heat and add the chopped onion, cooking until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and celery and cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the lentils, water, vegetable broth, Italian seasoning, salt, and black pepper, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 40 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Stir in the chopped hard-boiled eggs and continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the donabe from the heat and let it cool slightly before serving.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for later use.
